steps.title: Identify the key evidence
steps.content: The crucial evidence is that clam size and abundance increased when the Kwakwaka'wakw terraced garden practice was implemented. This measurable increase directly demonstrates the practice's effectiveness.

steps.title: Connect to the correct conclusion
steps.content: Choice A directly captures what this evidence supports: the practice was effective at maintaining the resource and promoted its robustness. The other three all introduce claims beyond what the passage establishes. That matches choice A — A is correct.
